steps.clue: Build and upgrade all four staffs.
Place the staffs in their four matching holders.
Press the robot button and throw a G-Strike onto the stone seal.
Deploy the Maxis Drone into the opened pit and defeat the Panzers.
Shoot down the glowing plane and kill its pilot while in Zombie Blood.
Upgrade every player's One Inch Punch inside the excavation site.
Return the staffs to the Crazy Place and collect 100 souls.
Release Maxis into the central portal.
